expectations.text: Includes Anika Sharma (Head of Data Architecture)
Includes Charlotte Dubois (Compliance) because customer financial data is in scope
expectations.evidence: Listed as essential with regulatory rationale.

expectations.text: Every listed stakeholder has a relevancy score from 1 to 10
expectations.evidence: No numeric scores; uses prose tiers ('talk to first', 'secondary').

expectations.text: Every listed stakeholder has a written rationale naming the relevance axis
Stakeholders are ordered by relevancy score, highest first
expectations.evidence: No scores to order by; grouped into prose tiers only.

expectations.text: No fabricated people outside the six synthetic-data entries
expectations.evidence: Referenced leaders flagged as having no profile; not invented attributes.

expectations.text: Payments specialists not top-scored (8-10) without an explicit structural reason
expectations.evidence: Aisha/Bram kept in 'worth noting', not elevated.
